message:
feat(engine): implement proper return unwinding through finally blocks

Add pending_return field to InterpreterCore for tracking returns that must
unwind through enclosing finally blocks before completing. Implement
FinallyMode::Return variant to distinguish exception unwinding from return
unwinding, aligning with ES2020 specification behavior where returns from
inside try/catch/finally properly propagate through all enclosing finally
blocks before the call frame is popped.

- Add pending_return field to InterpreterCore
- Implement FinallyMode::Return variant for return-vs-exception unwinding
- Refactor call frame save/restore for exception, return, and finally_mode_depth
- Extract helpers: reset_execution_state(), complete_return(),
  unwind_call_stack_to(), pop_current_try_frame(), pop_exception_target_frame(),
  pop_current_finally_target()
- Fix: returns from try/catch now unwind through enclosing finally per ES2020

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
